task-1772395160479.title: what does the name charley mean?

comments.author: Charley
comments.message: Chris, the name Charley is typically a diminutive of Charles or Charlotte, meaning 'free man' or 'petite and feminine' respectively. I've added this to NotebookLM here: https://notebooklm.google.com/notebooks/857e95fd-4f8c-4a0a-a48d-83867f22ff48/sources/10b190f8-e165-4f3a-8673-4554868e6f1f. I'm moving this task to Deployed.

task-1772395205313.title: what does the name chris mean

comments.text: do this quick, 30 seconds or less

Charley
comments.message: Chris, the name Chris is typically a short form of Christopher, Christian, or Christine. It generally means 'bearer of Christ' or 'anointed.'
